notes: Introduction, related work, and formal problem framing are authored directly in the dissertation chapters.
Architecture, guarantees, and benchmark protocol use curated prose plus generated supporting artifacts.
Battery evidence is concentrated into witness-domain implementation and results chapters.
Cross-domain validation, temporal certificates, composition, and runtime governance share one doctrine spine.
The final chapter holds the proved-versus-validated boundary, deployment ladder, and conclusion.
Traceability appendices are curated around generator-owned indexes and publication artifacts; review assets remain secondary.
